steps.title: Read the graph at x = 3
steps.content: The graph is only an estimate, so do not claim an exact point. At $x=3$, the curve is between $10,000$ and $15,000$ dollars on the vertical axis.

steps.title: Use interval elimination
steps.content: Only one answer choice lies in that interval: $13,632$. The other choices correspond to values that are too low or too high for the graph reading at $x=3$.

steps.title: Confirm the estimate
steps.content: The closest predicted value $3$ years after purchase is $13,632$, which matches choice B.
